SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.repository.document

Interface EventRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Event,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Event,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Event,String>, org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository.MongoRepository<@NonNull Event,@NonNull String>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Event,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Event>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Event,String>
public interface EventRepository extends org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository.MongoRepository<@NonNull Event,@NonNull String>
MongoDB Repository for managing Event entities.

This interface handles operations for events. Each time a find is performed, the result is paginated to limit the number of results

      date - the minimum starting date of the events
      pageable - used to manage pagination

    • calculateStatistics

      @Aggregation(pipeline={"{ \'$match\': {\'_id\': ?0} }","{\n \"$project\": {\n \"total_attenders\": { \"$size\": { \"$ifNull\": [\"$attendees\", []] } },\n \"average_rating\": { \"$ifNull\": [\"$event_score\", 0] },\n \"date_update\": \"$$NOW\",\n \"publish\": { \"$literal\": false },\n \"totalAgeSum\": {\n \"$reduce\": {\n \"input\": { \"$ifNull\": [\"$attendees\", []] },\n \"initialValue\": 0,\n \"in\": {\n \"$add\": [\n \"$$value\",\n {\n \"$dateDiff\": {\n \"startDate\": { \"$toDate\": \"$$this.date_of_birth\" },\n \"endDate\": \"$$NOW\",\n \"unit\": \"year\"\n }\n }\n ]\n }\n }\n },\n \"calculatedIncome\": {\n \"$reduce\": {\n \"input\": { \"$ifNull\": [\"$attendees\", []] },\n \"initialValue\": 0,\n \"in\": {\n \"$add\": [\n \"$$value\",\n { \"$ifNull\": [ { \"$getField\": { \"field\": \"$$this.ticket_type\", \"input\": \"$ticket_price\" } }, 0 ] }\n ]\n }\n }\n },\n \"originList\": {\n \"$map\": {\n \"input\": { \"$setUnion\": { \"$ifNull\": [\"$attendees.home_town\", []] } },\n \"as\": \"city\",\n \"in\": {\n \"k\": \"$$city\",\n \"v\": {\n \"$size\": {\n \"$filter\": {\n \"input\": { \"$ifNull\": [\"$attendees\", []] },\n \"as\": \"att\",\n \"cond\": { \"$eq\": [\"$$att.home_town\", \"$$city\"] }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n}\n","{\n \"$project\": {\n \"date_update\": 1,\n \"total_attenders\": 1,\n \"publish\": 1,\n \"average_rating\": 1,\n \"predicted_income\": { \"$ifNull\": [\"$calculatedIncome\", 0] },\n \"average_age\": {\n \"$cond\": [\n { \"$eq\": [\"$total_attenders\", 0] },\n 0,\n { \"$divide\": [\"$totalAgeSum\", { \"$cond\": [{ \"$eq\": [\"$total_attenders\", 0] }, 1, \"$total_attenders\"] }] }\n ]\n },\n \"origin_attenders\": { \"$arrayToObject\": \"$originList\" }\n }\n}\n"}) Statistics calculateStatistics(String eventId)
      Aggregates and computes detailed analytics for a specific event.

      The pipeline performs a multi-stage transformation:

      • Filters by event ID.
      • Pre-calculates core metrics:
        • Calculates attendee ages using $dateDiff between their birth date and the current time.
        • Computes dynamic income by matching attendee ticket_type with the event's ticket_price map.
        • Builds a frequency list of attendee origins (home towns).
      • Finalizes metrics, including average age and converts the origin list into a structured map (object).

      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier of the event.
      Returns:
      A Statistics object containing demographic, financial, and geographic data.

    • eventDemographic

      @Aggregation(pipeline={"{\n \"$match\": {\n \"position.city_name\": ?0,\n \"$expr\": { \"$eq\": [ { \"$year\": \"$starting_date\" }, ?1 ] }\n }\n}\n","{\n \"$group\": {\n \"_id\": { \"$month\": \"$starting_date\" },\n \"total_count\": { \"$sum\": 1 }\n }\n}\n","{\n \"$densify\": {\n \"field\": \"_id\",\n \"range\": {\n \"step\": 1,\n \"bounds\": [1, 13]\n }\n }\n}\n","{ \'$sort\': { \'_id\': 1 } }","{\n \"$project\": {\n \"city\": ?0,\n \"year\": {\"$literal\": ?1},\n \"month\": {\n \"$arrayElemAt\": [\n [ \"\", \"January\", \"February\", \"March\", \"April\", \"May\", \"June\", \"July\", \"August\", \"September\", \"October\", \"November\", \"December\" ],\n \"$_id\"\n ]\n },\n \"event_count\": { \"$ifNull\": [\"$total_count\", 0] },\n \"_id\": 0\n }\n}\n"}) List<HashMap<String,Object>> eventDemographic(String city, int year)
      Generates a monthly distribution of events for a specific city and year.

      This query is designed for time-series analysis and ensures a complete data set:

      • Filtering: Matches events based on the specified city name and year of the starting_date.
      • Grouping: Aggregates the count of events occurring in each month.
      • Densification: Uses $densify to ensure all 12 months (1-12) are present in the output, filling missing months with zero values.
      • Projection: Maps month numbers to their full English names and formats the final output map.

      Parameters:
      city - The name of the city to filter by.
      year - The year to analyze.
      Returns:
      A list of maps, each containing the city, year, month name, and event count.
